response:
Progress Report, Part II  
This report highlights the visual enhancements implemented during the game's redevelopment. Although we successfully nearly doubled the frame rate by incorporating optimization features into the framework, the integration of new hardware-intensive functionalities, such as dynamic fluid particles and physics-based hair strands, introduces additional performance considerations. We aim to maintain a balance between these features.  
Picture #1 illustrates the new belly bulge system. In the redeveloped game, each character possesses a specific stomach capacity that dictates how much "body fluid" can be stored in their womb, stomach, and bowels. For instance, Dr. Anya can accommodate up to 4000ml of sperm without overflow, whereas Alet is limited to 2800ml. Male test subjects release varying amounts of liquid during climax: a Dreamer typically expels approximately 10-15ml, while an Elder Thing delivers 400-600ml into their partner.  
Pictures #2 and #3 showcase the new cum and love juice graphics. The fluid effects are not pre-configured in sex scenes and instead activate dynamically based on the character's sensitivity, ecstasy levels, and stamina. Certain character abilities, obtained through testing with specific test subjects, may increase the likelihood of urinary incontinence or excessive squirting.  
Pictures #4 and #5 depict interactive body dynamics and skin decals in VR, with hands moving through a VR controller.  
Pictures #6, #7, and #8 present previews of upcoming bondage equipment and cooperative sex scenarios. More details will be released in the coming months.  
The May Monthly Poll and returning costume bundle are set to drop in a few hours.
